name: Colima
description: Colima — Container runtime for macOS and Linux using Lima VMs; provides Docker and containerd sockets as Docker Desktop alternative.

seo.title: Colima — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Colima: Colima — Container runtime for macOS and Linux using Lima VMs; provides Docker and containerd sockets as Docker Desktop alternative.

when_to_use: Docker Desktop replacement on macOS with lower resource usage
Running Docker and containerd on Apple Silicon via Lima VMs
Rootless container runtime for security-conscious developers
Switching between Docker and containerd socket configurations
Lightweight local Kubernetes cluster via colima start --kubernetes

cons: Volume and network quirks on macOS
review.verdict: A great free alternative to Docker Desktop for devs comfortable in the terminal.
review.best_for: macOS and Linux devs avoiding Docker Desktop's license cost
review.not_for: Teams that rely on Docker Desktop's GUI and Windows support
